sections.title: The Medulla Oblongata
sections.hint: Rule of 4: CN 9-12 are in the Medulla.

topics.content:
The pyramids carry the corticospinal tracts. The olive sits laterally.

  • CN XII exits between pyramid and olive.

medulla.q: Which artery results in Lateral Medullary Syndrome?
medulla.l: PICA supplies the lateral medulla; ASA supplies the medial.
